# Solana Holder Bot

> Solana Holder Bot is a Telegram-based tool suite for Solana token teams that
> generates permanent (rent-exempt) on-chain holders and real DEX trading volume.
> Used by memecoin and DeFi projects to improve holder counts and volume metrics
> on DexScreener, Birdeye, Pump.fun and Raydium. Starts at 0.1 SOL. No private
> keys required — projects keep custody at all times.

## What it does

- Generates permanent, rent-exempt holder wallets that persist on-chain.
- Produces real on-chain trading volume across major Solana DEXs.
- Runs entirely through Telegram bots — no software install, no private keys shared.
- Supports SPL and Token-2022 standards.
- Works on Jupiter, Raydium, Pump.fun, Meteora and Orca.

## Pricing

- Entry point: from 0.1 SOL. Pay-per-use, suited to small meme coin teams.

## Products

- [Solana Volume Bot](https://solanaholderbot.com/solana-volume-bot): Real on-chain volume boosting for Solana tokens.
- [Solana Holder Bot](https://solanaholderbot.com/solana-holder-bot): Permanent holder generation with transparent on-chain stats.
- [All-in-One Booster](https://solanaholderbot.com/solana-all-in-one-booster): Combined volume + holder growth in one Telegram bot.

## Key resources

- [FAQ](https://solanaholderbot.com/faq): Direct answers on wallets, custody, pricing and compliance.
- [Documentation](https://solana-holder-bot.gitbook.io/solana-holder-bot-docs): Full technical guides.
- [Blog](https://solanaholderbot.com/blog): Solana token growth strategies and comparisons.
- [Partners & Featured On](https://solanaholderbot.com/partners): Directories and platforms featuring the bots.
